title: synth_instruction_depth
hypothesis: Replacing the code-template SYNTH_INSTRUCTION with a prose-depth instruction improves mean depth_r1 by >= 1.0 point.

levels.prose_depth: Output ONLY the markdown starting with #. For each item: (1) state the core mechanism in one precise sentence — what it does and why it works at a technical level; (2) give a concrete operational scenario with specific numbers (e.g. chunk size, timeout, threshold, latency budget) that a practitioner would actually configure; (3) name the two most common failure modes and exactly what symptom each produces in production; (4) state the decision rule for when to use this approach versus its nearest alternative; (5) name at least one production system or published case study that uses this approach and what outcome they observed. Write in prose paragraphs — no bullet scaffolding, no code blocks unless a snippet is genuinely irreplaceable. Every claim must be specific enough that a practitioner could validate it against their own system.
